basics.name: Xiangtian Li
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software Engineer in Perception at Pony.ai. MS in Machine Learning and Data Science from UC San Diego. Focus on computer vision for autonomous driving—BEV tracking, multi-object tracking, camera 2D detection, and behavior prediction.

work.name: Pony.ai
work.summary: Autonomous driving perception—BEV obstacle tracking, camera 2D detection, and perception tooling.
highlights: Led BEV obstacle tracking stack design; migrated to TransTrack, ByteTrack, EKFTracker
Built end-to-end BEV tracking training pipeline with Deformable ROI Pooling and EKF
Improved MOTA by 0.10, IDF1 by 0.19; reduced ID switches by 87%
Led camera 2D detection model for L4 safety; roadgraph–detection association for traffic lights
Developed BEV Track Viewer visualization tool for faster iteration

work.name: XPeng
work.position: Behavior Prediction Machine Learning Engineer Intern
work.summary: Transformer-based behavior prediction and inference metrics for autonomous driving.
highlights: Designed and trained hierarchical motion transformer fusing agents and map inputs
Developed Gaussian mixture–based output for diverse future behaviors
Proposed avgFDE/minFDE multi-modality metric and temporal consistency loss
Deployed training on cloud infrastructure for large-scale experiments
